app.name: WiiBrowser Lite
app.long_description:
WiiBrowser is a web browser for the wii by gave92 started from WiiXplore sources and using a customized libwiigui as base for the GUI. WiiBrowser Lite is a homebrew alternative to the Wii's Internet Channel and an updated version of the original WiiBrowser created by gave92. The main goal is to provide a more modern codebase to make it easier for other developers to work on. Although I am not doing much actual work on it myself, contributions through pull requests and similar methods are still welcome.
Features: * View your own web pages * Basic HTTP and HTTPS connection support * Links and web form support * Bookmarks * Import/Export of bookmarks * Basic rendering of HTML 4.01 and CSS2 * Download support to an SD/SDHC card * Upload support * Address bar with on-screen keyboard * Keyboard auto-completion * Forward and back navigation * PNG/JPEG/GIF/BMP image support * ZIP/RAR/7Z extraction * Moving and resizing images * Auto-refresh
Controls: * IR: Move pointer * A: Click buttons * Hold B: Free scroll * DPad: Navigate * (+) Button: Open app bar * (-) Button: Close app bar * 1: Take screenshot * 2: Restore default view * Home: Exit app
Shortcuts: * B + DPad up: Refresh current page * B + DPad down: Save page * B + DPad left: Browse homepage * B + DPad right: Enter new URL * B + (-) key: Go back a page * B + (+) Key: Go forward one page
